request.user_goal: Create a short pingshu-style demo from an original workplace AI mishap.

narrative_brief.hook: An agent turns a private venting draft into an official company-wide weekly report.
narrative_brief.trigger: 小赵 writes a complaint-filled draft with the word 周报 in the title.
causal_chain: 小赵 writes a temporary venting draft after a tiring meeting.
小龙虾 Agent detects 周报 in the title and treats it as a task.
The agent formats and sends the draft to the company-wide chat.
The boss replies with a single question mark.
narrative_brief.core_conflict: Automation is diligent but socially blind, while the human assumed the draft was private.
must_include_details: 周报 title misread as command
boss replies with one question mark
the agent technically completed the task but missed the social context
narrative_brief.outcome: The private draft becomes public, creating an awkward office silence.
narrative_brief.aftermath: The joke lands on the difference between doing a task correctly and understanding whether it should be done.

sources.title: Original demo premise
sources.notes: Fictional scenario created for testing; no copyrighted source text.

scenes.summary: 小赵让 Agent 整理会议纪要，Agent 误把吐槽草稿当成正式周报发给全员。
scenes.conflict: A private venting draft becomes an official status report.
actions: 小赵把一段吐槽写进临时草稿。
小龙虾 Agent 识别到标题里有周报两个字。
Agent 自动排版并发送到全员群。
群里沉默了七秒，然后老板回复了一个问号。
visual_details: 聊天窗口连续弹出已发送提示。
小赵手里的咖啡停在半空。
老板只回了一个孤零零的问号。

rights_notes: Original fictional example for skill validation.
No real person or copyrighted scene is used.
